title: VanillaBird+
description: Take your Minecraft experience to the next level with this performance-focused, visually stunning modpack. Whether you're chasing higher FPS, gorgeous visuals, or little tweaks that make the game feel smoother and more immersive, this pack has you covered
body:
# Description
This modpack is a collection of client-side mods that focus on optimization, visual upgrades, and gameplay enhancements without altering core Minecraft mechanics. Perfect for players looking to maximize performance, improve visuals, and streamline gameplay - all while keeping the vanilla feel intact.

## Key Features

### Performance Optimization

Boost your FPS and reduce lag with **Sodium**, **Lithium**, and **FerriteCore**.
Enhancements like **Entity Culling**, **ImmediatelyFast**, and **Dynamic FPS** ensure smooth gameplay even on lower-end hardware.
Additional improvements with **Sodium Extra** and **Reese's Sodium Options**.

### Stunning Visuals

Add gorgeous shader support with **Iris Shaders** and enhance lighting.
Enjoy immersive details with mods like **Falling Leaves**, **3D Skin Layers**, and **Wavey Capes**.
Beautiful textures come to life with **Patrix 32x** (optional for screenshots, etc.) and **Fresh Animations**.

### Seamless Communication
Stay connected with Simple Voice Chat, featuring proximity-based voice chat for natural, in-game conversations.

# Mods Included
The pack includes over 40 popular mods such as:

Sodium, Iris Shaders, FerriteCore, Lithium (for optimization)
Falling Leaves, Fresh Animations (for visuals)
Sound Physics Remastered, AmbientSounds (for audio)
Xaero's Minimap, Xaero's World Map (for navigation)
And many more quality-of-life and gameplay refinements!
